articles.headline: Spurs beat Villa put pressure back on West Ham
articles.description: Goals from Conor Gallagher and Richarlison give Spurs a much needed win as they leapfrog West Ham in the Premier League table.

articles.headline: Man United sneak past Liverpool at Old Trafford
articles.description: Handball or no handball? Benjamin Sesko's goal becomes the big talking point as Manchester United defeat the Reds.

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Inter Miami aim to pair Casemiro with Messi
articles.description: Casemiro could be the latest star to join Lionel Messi at Inter Miami. Transfer Talk has the latest.

articles.headline: Roberto De Zerbi: Spurs have '12 players' with Conor Gallagher
articles.description: BIRMINGHAM -- Tottenham boss Roberto De Zerbi said he has "twelve players" on the pitch when Conor Gallagher is on song after the midfielder scored a crucial goal in Spurs' 2-1 win over Aston Villa on Sunday.

articles.headline: From crisis to PL survival belief, Roberto De Zerbi sparks Tottenham reawakening in crucial Aston Villa win
articles.description: Tottenham are out of the relegation zone, and the relief was palpable at Villa Park. ESPN's Aiman Khalid reports from a big win for Spurs, and new boss Roberto De Zerbi.

articles.headline: Nicol: Saka could win Arsenal the Premier League title
articles.description: Steve Nicol says the return of Bukayo Saka to the Arsenal squad could win them the Premier League title.

articles.headline: Nicol: Spurs won't go down if they play like they did vs. Villa
articles.description: The ESPN FC team discusses Tottenham Hotspur's performance against Aston Villa in their Premier League clash, breaking down what Spurs must do to avoid relegation.

articles.headline: Nicol: Liverpool look 'absolutely lost' under Arne Slot
articles.description: Steve Nicol slams Liverpool's 3-2 defeat to Manchester United and suggests Xabi Alonso as a replacement for Arne Slot.

articles.headline: Burley: Man Utd should give Iraola the permanent role
articles.description: Craig Burley gives his opinion on who Manchester United should hire as their permanent manager despite Michael Carrick's success as interim boss.

articles.headline: De Zerbi proud of Spurs win but warns: 'Don't forget situation we were in'
articles.description: Roberto De Zerbi has spoken of his pride at seeing his Tottenham team beat Aston Villa, but warned against forgetting the situation his side were in just a matter of weeks ago.

articles.headline: Tottenham beat Aston Villa to move out of relegation places
articles.description: Tottenham looked like a team destined to secure Premier League survival after they beat a dire Aston Villa 2-1 to move out of the bottom three.

articles.headline: Are Tottenham going to be relegated from the Premier League? What stats, charts say
articles.description: For Tottenham fans, the team's nosedive into the relegation zone has forced them to think the unthinkable - are they really going to go down?

articles.headline: Spurs move out of relegation zone with crucial victory at Villa
articles.description: Tottenham breathed new life into their battle to stay in the Premier League with a 2-1 victory at Champions League-chasing Aston Villa to move out of the relegation zone.

articles.headline: Sir Alex Ferguson taken to hospital after feeling unwell before Man United vs. Liverpool - sources
articles.description: Sir Alex Ferguson left Old Trafford ahead of Manchester United's Premier League clash with Liverpool on Sunday after feeling unwell and was taken to hospital for precautionary checks, sources have told ESPN.

articles.headline: Could Bruno Fernandes break long-standing Premier League assist record?
articles.description: Bruno Fernandes is on the verge of equalling the record for the most assists registered in a single Premier League season.

articles.headline: Fantasy Goal Assist? Why Bruno Fernandes didn't equal Premier League record against Liverpool
articles.description: Bruno Fernandes was given FPL points for his "assist" against Liverpool. So why hasn't he equalled the record?

articles.headline: Man United win over Liverpool seals Champions League return
articles.description: Kobbie Mainoo's winning goal secured Manchester United's return to the Champions League and left rivals Liverpool facing a nervy end to the season.

articles.headline: Michael Carrick on Man United's Champions League return: 'Feels natural'
articles.description: Michael Carrick said it "feels natural" to be Manchester United manager after guiding the club to Champions League qualification with victory over Liverpool.

articles.headline: Carrick: Return to Champions League a huge step for Man United
articles.description: Michael Carrick speaks after Man United's win over Liverpool confirmed their Champions League spot for next season.

articles.headline: Slot blames Liverpool loss to Man United on 'pattern' of bad calls
articles.description: Arne Slot said there is a "complete pattern" of decisions going against his Liverpool team this season after Manchester United inflicted a 3-2 defeat at OId Trafford with a handball on Benjamin Sesko's goal being overlooked by match officials.

articles.headline: Nicol: Appointing Carrick permanently still a tough call for Man United
articles.description: Steve Nicol believes that questions remain over Michael Carrick's experience, despite progress as Manchester United F.C. interim manager.

articles.headline: Nicol: Liverpool defensively are a shambles
articles.description: Steve Nicol slams Liverpool's defensive display after their 3-2 defeat to Man United.

articles.headline: Aston Villa vs Tottenham in Premier League: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: Everything you need to know about Aston Villa vs Tottenham in the Premier League, including key talking points.

articles.headline: Man United hold off Liverpool fightback to qualify for Champions League
articles.description: Homegrown Manchester United star Kobbie Mainoo sealed a helter-skelter 3-2 victory against archrivals Liverpool, earning them Champions League qualification.

articles.headline: Slot: VAR decisions have gone against Liverpool all season
articles.description: Arne Slot hits out at VAR after Liverpool's 3-2 defeat against Manchester United in the Premier League.

articles.headline: Manchester United vs. Liverpool in Premier League: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: Everything you need to know about Manchester United vs Liverpool in the Premier League, including five key talking points.

articles.headline: Everton vs Manchester City in Premier League: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: All you need to know ahead of Monday's Premier League clash between Everton and Manchester City.

articles.headline: Chelsea vs Nottingham Forest in Premier League: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: All you need to know ahead of Monday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and Nottingham Forest.

articles.headline: The earliest dates Arsenal or Man City could win the Premier League title
articles.description: The Premier League title race between Manchester City and Arsenal is set to go right down to the wire. But when could either side win it earliest?

articles.headline: What must happen for Man United to secure Champions League spot?
articles.description: Manchester United are on the verge of returning to the Champions League after Brighton's 3-1 loss to Newcastle on Saturday.

articles.headline: Premier League players out of contract: Who could leave your team on a free this summer?
articles.description: ESPN takes a look at the players who are out of contract in 2026 across all 20 Premier League clubs.

articles.headline: Arsenal and Man City's remaining Premier League fixtures compared as title race hots up
articles.description: The Premier League title race is well and truly underway with Arsenal being chased down by Pep Guardiola's Manchester City in their hunt for a first top-flight trophy since 2004.
